offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 clients/month, compliance documentation delays cause missed deadlines. We generate audit-ready documentation instead of manual documentation processes.
problem: Need for timely and accurate audit-ready documentation.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Share insights in community forums for accountants
try_it: Let users try template generation for compliance documents on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
